name: [GRIDHAND] Seasonal Campaign Agent - New Year: Jan 1 → goal-setting offer → check-in Jan 15

gridhand.scenario: New Year: Jan 1 → goal-setting offer → check-in Jan 15
gridhand.description: On January 1st, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, sending a personalized email to all gym members with a goal-setting offer, complete with a special promotion for personal training sessions and a downloadable fitness plan template. Over the next two weeks, members who engage with the email are automatically added to a follow-up sequence, culminating in a check-in email on January 15th that tracks their progress and provides motivational content to help them stay on track. By leveraging this automated workflow, the gym owner can increase member engagement and retention, driving revenue growth through targeted promotions and support, all while freeing up staff time to focus on high-touch, high-value services.
